name: Paracetamol 500mg

name: Crocin

name: Metformin 500mg
description: Metformin is used to manage type 2 diabetes and control glucose levels.

name: Pantoprazole
description: Pantoprazole tablets are used to treat acid reflux and stomach ulcers.

name: Omeprazole
description: Omeprazole helps reduce excess stomach acid and treat GERD.

name: ORS Sachet

name: Zinc Tablets

description: Calcium tablets help maintain strong bones and teeth.

name: Aspirin

name: Insulin Injection

name: Cough Syrup

name: Antacid Tablets

name: Ciprofloxacin
